mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 or positive 20d returns occur in >55% of observations despite rising rates

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 4.5%, monetary policy becomes sufficiently restrictive to trigger immediate risk-off positioning, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are non-negative in >60% of triggered instances

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in the unemployment rate and an increase in total nonfarm payrolls signals robust labor market tightening, which boosts consumer spending expectations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative 20d returns in >50% of cases or interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing

mechanism_narrative: During late-cycle expansions, accelerating real GDP growth combined with rising real savings funds indicates strong underlying demand, which supports corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict positive 60d returns in >55% of late-cycle observations or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the index of industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing and utility output, which immediately improves short-term earnings momentum and yields positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of months with rising INDPRO

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts fall below 1200 thousand units, it signals a sharp contraction in residential investment and construction activity, dragging down related sector earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >55% of triggered instances

mechanism_narrative: Rising real savings funds alongside increasing housing starts indicate synchronized strength in financial intermediation and residential construction, which amplifies credit availability and drives positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect is statistically insignificant or joint signal yields negative 60d returns in >50% of cases

mechanism_narrative: During post-shock recovery phases, an unemployment rate above 4.5% indicates persistent labor market slack that suppresses wage growth and consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >55% of triggered instances within the specified regime
